title: sphaeralcea pulchella
intro: Sphaeralcea pulchella, also known as the dwarf globe-mallow or red globe-mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, known for its bright orange or yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea pulchella include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to address various health concerns, such as colds, fever, and skin irritations.
